description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, modern fuselage with a predominantly white exterior accented by blue and yellow striping along the sides. The cockpit is enclosed with large, dark-tinted windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing excellent visibility for pilots and passengers. The main rotor consists of four long, slender blades with yellow tips, while the tail rotor is enclosed in a fenestron-style housing at the end of the tail boom, which is marked with red, yellow, and green stripes. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, black skids with crossbars for stability. The helicopter's body includes multiple access doors and hatches, and the overall design suggests a utility or police helicopter suitable for urban operations. No visible registration number or alphanumeric markings are present on the exterior.
description: A modern white helicopter with blue and yellow accents, large tinted cockpit windows, a four-blade main rotor, and a fenestron tail rotor. It features black landing skids and a streamlined body suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, large wraparound cockpit windows, and the symmetrical spread of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue and yellow striping, fenestron tail rotor with colored stripes, and the full length of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, fenestron tail rotor, and the symmetry of the main rotor blades from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit windows, side doors, and the colored tail fin with fenestron rotor.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, slender main rotor blades, likely made of composite material, with black bodies and yellow tips. The blades are straight and evenly spaced, extending well beyond the fuselage.
attribute_tail_rotor: Fenestron-style tail rotor with multiple short blades enclosed in a circular housing at the end of the tail boom. The housing is marked with red, yellow, and green stripes, and the blades are oriented horizontally within the duct.
attribute_landing_skids: Two black, tubular landing skids with crossbars for stability, made of metal or composite material. The skids are simple in design and provide a wide, stable base for landing.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Large, wraparound cockpit windows with a dark tint, comprising at least four main panels: two front and two side. The windows are framed in black and provide wide visibility.
